title: A leányvári boszorkány
actors: Éva Szörényi, Imre Hámory, Blanka Szombathelyi
plot: Eva Szorenvi and Blanka Szombathelyi are the daughters of pawnbroker Gvula Csortos, and more than a little bit stuck-up and anti-social. They refuse to attend affairs and parties given by the students in the near-by forestry school.
